name: VALUE LINE INC
summary: Value Line, Inc. is a New York-based investment research company that produces investment periodicals, publications, and proprietary research including The Value Line Investment Survey. It markets research tools, investment analysis software, and financial databases to individual investors, professionals, and institutions. The company also holds non-voting revenue and profits interests in EULAV Asset Management (EAM), which manages the Value Line Mutual Funds and provides distribution, marketing, and administrative services.
